description: Semantic mapping from upstream ultimatepp/ultimatepp monolithic IDE sources to the split local tree.
notes: pkg reuses uppsrc/ide/Core for headless package, workspace, build graph, and acceptflags-aware metadata behavior.
Mappings are intentionally broad and semantic; they should be updated whenever files move between the shim, Core, and GUI packages.

destinations.semantic: Shim/shell package glue and manifest-level entrypoints
Shared headless IDE logic, including package/workspace/build metadata and console helpers
GUI controller, editor, and IDE user-interface implementation
Console and headless startup handling
GUI application bootstrap and IDE session startup
Shared headless declarations and core package API
GUI-only IDE declarations
Shim package manifest that selects the GUI or console split
Package manifest parsing, acceptflags, and source-file scan logic for the headless core
Workspace loading, package expansion, and dependency traversal for the headless core
Build graph construction, builder dispatch, and shared headless build behavior
Nest/assembly discovery and package directory resolution
Package and build cache management
Binary object handling for the headless build path
Signature tracking and change detection for packages
Preprocessor information and package metadata plumbing
Host/platform abstraction shared by headless IDE logic
Host/platform abstraction implementation
Headless logging helpers used by shared IDE logic
Headless logging helpers used by shared IDE logic
Shared helper utilities for headless IDE logic
Common headless IDE helpers
Headless pkg CLI and plan output
Shared package/workspace/build metadata path reused by pkg
